name: Battle Smith Spells
description: When you reach an Artificer level specified in the Battle Smith Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared. Battle Smith Spells table: 3rd level – Heroism, Shield; 5th level – Shining Smite, Warding Bond; 9th level – Aura of Vitality, Conjure Barrage; 13th level – Aura of Purity, Fire Shield; 17th level – Banishing Smite, Mass Cure Wounds.
